The Well of Returning Names: History, Folklore, and Local Memory

A source-aware archive record examining a village well is said to repeat names forgotten by the speaker.

Legendary Places

The Hill of Bells No Map Names Twice: A Legendary Place Explained

A quiet archive record following a hill of bells appears in old directions under different names but never twice on the same map.

Legendary Places

The Bridge of Names No One Reads Aloud

A quiet record built around a legendary bridge has names carved beneath the rail that locals refuse to read aloud.

The Mountain Shrine That Refuses a Second Photograph

A quiet record built around a mountain shrine appears clearly in first photographs but blurs in every second image taken from the same step.
